  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Failure to isolate stored energy sources (hydraulic pressure, gravity, or capacitor charge) during lockout/tagout application."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately halt all service work on the asset.",
    "Relieve, disconnect, restrain, or otherwise render safe all stored or residual energy sources.",
    "Verify isolation of all energy sources before resuming any service activities."
  ],
  "rationale": "The lockout/tagout procedure failed to account for and isolate stored energy sources (such as hydraulic pressure, gravity, or electrical capacitors). Under OSHA 1910.147, all potentially hazardous stored or residual energy must be relieved, disconnected, restrained, and otherwise rendered safe. Proceeding with service work under these conditions poses an immediate, critical safety hazard.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(4)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)(5)"
  ]
}
